articles.title: DA: Man charged in Pittsfield fatal stabbing had ‘no prior connection’ to victim
articles.description:
“This senseless act led to the death of Jesse Gray and forever impacted the families of both Mr. Gray and the Defendant as well as the community. My thoughts are with all of those impacted by Mr. Gray’s murder,” the DA said.

The post DA: Man charged in Pittsfield fatal stabbing had ‘no prior connection’ to victim appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Man charged in Pittsfield stabbing death of Jesse Gray, impacting local community.
District Attorney confirmed no prior connection between the defendant and victim.
The incident has deeply affected families and residents in Pittsfield.

articles.title: Patriots lose new tight end for 2026 season due to injury
articles.description:
Hill — who signed a three-year deal in New England this spring — was expected to be the team's backup tight end behind Hunter Henry.

The post Patriots lose new tight end for 2026 season due to injury appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots tight end Julian Hill will miss the entire 2026 season due to injury.
Hill signed a three-year contract with the Patriots in spring 2026.
His absence affects the team's depth behind starter Hunter Henry.

articles.title: 5 clues A.J. Brown dropped about his desire to join the Patriots
articles.description:
From draft day tears to a wink at Julian Edelman, here moments that stood out from Brown's comments about the Patriots.

The post 5 clues A.J. Brown dropped about his desire to join the Patriots appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A.J. Brown expressed interest in joining the Patriots during recent comments.
He referenced Julian Edelman, hinting at a potential connection with the team.
Brown's desire could influence local fan enthusiasm and team dynamics in Boston.

articles.title: Coolidge Corner Theatre workers reject ‘last and final’ contract proposal, plan to announce strike date
articles.description:
Union officials said workers at the historic Brookline theater plan to move forward with a strike.

The post Coolidge Corner Theatre workers reject ‘last and final’ contract proposal, plan to announce strike date appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Coolidge Corner Theatre workers rejected the final contract proposal on June 1, 2026.
Union officials plan to announce a strike date soon, impacting local film screenings.
The strike could disrupt operations at the historic Brookline theater, affecting community events.
